site.title: Benjamin Nößler — Fullstack developer based in Vienna
site.description: Vienna-based freelance developer. Landing-page redesigns and fullstack builds for businesses that think beyond the next quarter.

hero.headline: Bilingual landing pages for Austrian businesses.
hero.body: I help Austrian businesses modernise their landing page: clear structure, fast load times, proper DE/EN, GDPR-compliant. For larger projects, let's talk about the right scope.

services.label: Services
services.intro: My focus: landing-page redesigns for Austrian businesses. For projects that go beyond a single page, let's talk about the right scope.

landing.title: Landing page redesign
landing.description: Analyse and rebuild an existing marketing or landing page — clear structure, fast load times, proper bilingual DE/EN, GDPR-compliant.
landing.priceAnchor: from €500 + hosting — concept, design, build as a fixed price. Final price defined after a call.

fullstack.title: Fullstack web apps
fullstack.description: For projects beyond a single page — web apps, dashboards, APIs, internal tools. Cleanly built, transparently deployed on owned infrastructure. Scope and price defined after a call.

steps.title: Talk
steps.body: 30 minutes, free. I listen, ask questions, tell you honestly whether I'm a fit.

steps.title: Fixed-price quote
steps.body: Clear scope, clear price. No hidden hours.

steps.title: Build in 2–4 weeks
steps.body: Transparent status, a single point of contact, clean launch.

about.label: About
bodyParagraphs: I help local businesses modernise their web presence — focus is landing-page redesigns. Vienna is home base; most of the work happens remote.

I split my time between a permanent role in the City of Vienna's digital team (through APC Business Services GmbH, currently on a web-app project) and selected freelance work — mostly landing-page redesigns for local businesses. I've been building web apps for years in employment and in my own projects (e.g. b-cal); on the freelance side I'm deliberately starting with a smaller scope.

I prefer projects meant to last longer than a quarter: cleanly built, on my own infrastructure (Hetzner/Coolify), with tools I'll still trust in two years. Business context matters to me as much as the code — so I enjoy talking to people who know their problem better than I do.

contact.label: Contact
contact.heading: Tell me about your project.
contact.body: Send me a few sentences about your project. I usually reply within 48 hours.

form.projectTypeHint: Not sure? Pick 'Something else' — we'll sort it out in the call.
form.messagePlaceholder: What's this about? A few sentences about the project, the current page, or your audience is perfect.
form.errorBody: Please try again or email me directly at benjamin@noessler.at.

validation.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.
validation.messageTooShort: Your message should be at least 20 characters.
